title: Forward Item update to slack based on column
excerpt:
I have been trying to forward updates to different slack channel based on the status column value. I am unable to find that. It send only notification not an whole update. 
Can you please help me ?

posts.author: Keyur (Keyur Thumar)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have been trying to forward updates to different slack channel based on the status column value. I am unable to find that. It send only notification not an whole update.

Can you please help me ?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! You are correct that the current Slack integration recipes only allow you to send a notification based on the status column change but you can send the contents of the updates in a channel when an update is added to your board.

However, to achieve the process you’re looking for, I’d suggest setting up two separate automation recipes:

  1. “When status changes, add update” (a regular automation recipe)
  2. “When update is added, send it in channel” (a Slack integration recipe)

Then the first one should trigger the second one on its own. I hope this helps! Let me know what you think!
